manual_recovery_notes: Orchestrator preflight hung on FUSE F_SETLKW lock acquisition (uv git resolution + uv install-phase atomic writes on /workspace FUSE/MooseFS). Recovery: SSH into pod, kill stuck uv, set UV_CACHE_DIR=/root/uv_cache + UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=/root/.venv, run uv sync + python scripts/train_rung.py --rung frozen_probe manually. 24/24 parquets + 12 final-epoch checkpoints pulled successfully. Cell 7 (fold2/seed42) HF Trainer atomic checkpoint save also stalled ~10 min on FUSE before self-resolving — same MooseFS F_SETLKW bug class. Pod deleted post-rsync. Refs: uv#17801, MooseFS#380, FUSE kernel patch 2025-12-23. Fix-forward: X8 commit applied UV_CACHE_DIR + UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT off /workspace to all 3 canonical-fire yamls for future orchestrator-fired runs.
